title: After the Mile Ch.: Settling the Storm

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...I lose. I feel so very frustrated... and sorry for
letting Trainer down too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Zephyr seems equally frustrated with her loss, and
is acting a little strange. I hope we can both finish
with smiles on our faces next time!
